parse.text:
This article relies largely or entirely on a single source. Relevant discussion may be found on the talk page. Please help improve this article by introducing citations to additional sources.
Find sources: "2018 in Legacy Fighting Alliance" – news · newspapers · books · scholar · JSTOR (November 2021)
2018 in Legacy Fighting Alliance
Shaun Spath after his loss to Ahmet Kayretli at Legacy Fighting Alliance 46: Nakashima vs. Stewart
Information
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
First date airedJanuary 12, 2018 (2018-01-12)
Last date airedDecember 7, 2018 (2018-12-07)
← 2017
2019 →

2018 was the second year in the history of Legacy Fighting Alliance, a mixed martial arts promotion based in the United States.

Event list

[edit]

Legacy Fighting Alliance 30: Millender vs. Barnes

[edit]
Legacy Fighting Alliance 30: Millender vs. Barnes
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateJanuary 12, 2018
VenueCosta Mesa Hall at the OC Fair & Event Center
CityCosta Mesa, California, U.S.
Event chronology
Legacy Fighting Alliance 29: Camus vs. Simón Legacy Fighting Alliance 30: Millender vs. Barnes Legacy Fighting Alliance 31: Moffett vs. Le

Legacy Fighting Alliance 30: Millender vs. Barnes was the thirty-first event of Legacy Fighting Alliance and took place on January 12, 2018. It aired on AXS TV.

Results

Main Card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Welterweight Curtis Millender def. Nick Barnes KO (head kick) 2 2:51
Featherweight Talison Soares def. Fernando Padilla Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Flyweight Maikel Pérez def. Charlie Alaniz Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Middleweight Jordan Wright def. Craig Wilkerson Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 1:29
Lightweight Christian Aguilera def. Maycon Mendonça KO (punch) 1 0:27
Bantamweight Vincent Cachero def. Nohelin Hernandez Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight Blake Troop def. Khadzhi Bestaev TKO (punches) 1 2:11
Preliminary Card
Featherweight Jeffrey Glossner def. Jose Avalos TKO (punches) 2 0:40
